nav.aboutDesc: iDAELİK is a modern appointment and business management platform designed to help small and medium-sized businesses build their digital presence and manage bookings effortlessly.

landing.title: Smart Appointment Booking for Modern Businesses
landing.subtitle: iDAELİK allows you to create your own booking page, accept appointments online or in cash, and manage your schedule easily.
landing.aboutP1: At iDAELİK, our mission is to seamlessly connect wellness and professional service practitioners with their clients. We understand the unique challenges professionals face in managing their schedules while ensuring a top-tier customer experience.
landing.aboutP2: Built with simplicity and elegance in mind, our platform eliminates the friction of traditional booking systems. We empower you with dynamic mobile-first scheduling, secure authentication, and instant notifications, allowing you to focus on what you do best: providing exceptional service.
landing.contactSubtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you shortly.
landing.messageError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

customer.bio: Compassionate Primary Care Physician and Medical Advisor.
customer.bioFull: We provide personalized health assessments and comprehensive medical plans to optimize your well-being, both in-clinic and via secure tele-health.
